title: PvPoptimizations
body:
"Built for Combat. Optimized for Victory."

Overview
This modpack is a performance-focused suite designed specifically for competitive PvP. It removes every technical barrier between you and your opponent by maximizing frame rates and minimizing input lag.

Why use this pack?
Elite Performance: Optimized to maintain high FPS even in massive bedwars matches or crowded arenas.

Low Latency: Fine-tuned to reduce input delay, ensuring your hits register exactly when they should.

Combat Clarity: Features mods that improve visibility, clear up particles, and enhance player tracking.

Pure Competitive: No unnecessary mods or fluff. Every included file serves one purpose: making you faster and more precise.

Key Features
FPS Boost: Advanced optimizations for smooth gameplay during fast-paced fights.

Clean Visuals: Reduced fire height, clear glass, and better brightness settings.

PvP Essentials: Includes crucial tools like Keystrokes, Armor Status, and Low Shield and fire.
